title: Camellia gaudichaudii
taxonomy: Camellia gaudichaudii is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. It is native to New Caledonia and belongs to the genus Camellia. The plant is classified as an evergreen shrub with glossy leaves and showy flowers. Camellia gaudichaudii is often grown in tropical and subtropical gardens for its attractive blooms. As a member of the Theaceae family, it is closely related to other species of Camellia and related genera.

The plant's leaves and flowers are said to have medicinal properties, although specific uses may vary depending on the region.
